reviews.comment:
Hice el cambio de aceite y filtros, ojo no usan la app de ypy pero te hacen el descuento manualmente, lo unico malo es que nunca se actualizo en la app el informe técnico que en otras ypf que hice mismo y a la semana estaba cardado en la app

(Translated by Google)
I had my oil and filters changed. Note that they don't use the YPF app, but they do apply the discount manually. The only downside is that the technical report never updated in the app, unlike at other YPF stations where it was updated within a week.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxd09LWmxnRRAB

reviews.comment:
No entiendo como pueden ser tan lentos en el servicio de carga de combustible.
Es una característica de la estación hace décadas

(Translated by Google)
I don't understand how they can be so slow with fuel service. It's been a feature of the station for decades.
